vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

boundaries.loads: payload 2-10kg at tip, joint torque 5-50Nm, 10k+ cycles

risk.desc: Potential thermal hotspots near the harmonic drive
risk.mit: Add additional cooling fins or increase heat sink size

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to improper strain relief
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry

risk.desc: Risk of assembly misalignment due to unclear datum references
risk.mit: Clearly define primary datum features and assembly sequences

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness in the base plate
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness or add rib stiffeners

risk.desc: Risk of ESD damage due to non-ESD-safe materials
risk.mit: Ensure all materials and seals are ESD-safe

cable entry point for harnesses and connectors
housing for the drive shaft of the harmonic drive

manufacturing_strategy.implications: CNC for base plate and LPBF for complex internal features

risk.mit: Specify tighter fit tolerances and use alignment tools

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload on fasteners leading to joint loosening

risk.desc: Potential for insufficient heat dissipation from the link body.
risk.mit: Increase thermal conductivity of the material or add fins for better heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of cable harness damage due to lack of strain relief at joint crossings.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of datum references.
risk.mit: Ensure primary datum features are explicitly named and placed.

risk.desc: Risk of joint failure due to inadequate fastener engagement depth.
risk.mit: Use inserts or bosses with adequate engagement depth for threaded connections.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly ambiguity due to lack of defined assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum for each step.

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each subsystem must include all required features and interfaces.

verify.value: Mass estimate is within the design envelope.
verify.rule: Mass estimate must be a numeric value and within the design envelope.

verify.value: All P0 features are mapped to geometry operations.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: Interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must have connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
Boundary conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal hotspots in the power channel.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks or improved airflow.

risk.desc: Risk of electromagnetic interference (EMI) between power and signal channels.
risk.mit: Ensure proper shielding and separation of power and signal lines.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient grounding leading to electrical issues.
risk.mit: Verify grounding scheme and ensure signal returns route alongside their signals.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fastener tightening leading to joint failure.
risk.mit: Provide clear torque specifications and tooling requirements.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for maintenance and diagnostics.
risk.mit: Ensure service covers and inspection windows are easily accessible.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

physics_paths.description: Signal lines from driver boards to motor controllers
Power lines to driver boards
Heat dissipation from electronics to ambient
Access for maintenance and diagnostics
Structural support for the drive electronics

verification_focus.description: Verify isolation between power and signal channels
Verify heat dissipation through the thermal inspection window
Verify stability under joint torque and payload loads
Verify accessibility for maintenance and diagnostics
Verify assembly sequence and tooling requirements
